text: What a strange and luminous threshold you are crossing — to choose, deliberately, to love something that cannot repay the debt in kind, that will track mud through your careful life and demand presence from you on its own inscrutable schedule. Every pet is a small tutor in impermanence, teaching through their shorter arc what the word "while" actually means. May this creature find in you a kind gravity, and may you find in them what most of us spend entire decades searching for: a love that asks nothing but your attention.
